sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9374" key="a)ntaglai/+zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνταγλᾰΐζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n9374.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shine brightly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:2:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
